# GoalOS AGIJobManager Ascension — Sovereign Experience Stream v24

Status: PASS locally.

## What v24 adds

A new public browser-local demonstration: `/sovereign-experience-stream.html`.

The page demonstrates that evidence bundles are not merely audit logs. Only replayable, validated, public-safe experience events can enter Chronicle memory, reward ledgers, router updates, or policy-update candidates.

## New files

- `site/sovereign-experience-stream.html`
- `site/assets/experience-stream.css`
- `site/assets/experience-stream.js`
- `data/sovereign-experience-stream-demo.json`
- `schemas/sovereign-experience-stream.schema.json`
- `docs/SOVEREIGN_EXPERIENCE_STREAM_V24.md`
- `tests/sovereign-experience-stream.test.mjs`
- `tools/sovereign-experience-stream-kernel.mjs`

## Preserved boundaries

No account, no form, no cookies, no analytics, no storage, no wallet connection, no network request, no token route, no transaction broadcast, no production authority, and no user data wanted.
